title: boesenbergia prainiana
intro: Boesenbergia prainiana, also known as Pinang or Krachai Dam, is a type of rhizomatous herbaceous plant native to Southeast Asia. It has been traditionally used in medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The plant's health benefits include its ability to aid digestion, relieve menstrual cramps, and lower blood sugar levels. Boesenbergia prainiana is often prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, and is also used in traditional cooking as a flavoring agent.
